summary: The diff correctly implements REQ-1: TutorialsSection.tsx now renders exactly two YouTube Shorts embeds using the specified video IDs (JqKmxZaWp-c and gdBxIyO-cIg), with a 9:16 portrait aspect ratio (paddingBottom: '177.78%'), in a balanced two-column grid layout. The third video has been removed, no old URLs remain, and only frontend files were modified.
